title: HamletCraft Season 5
description:
De HamletCraft Seizoen 5 modpack
Meer verkenning, bouwen en wat technologie!
body:
# **HamletCraft SMP Season 5 Modpack**

HamletCraft Season 5 is a large, progression-focused SMP modpack designed for long-term multiplayer play. It combines advanced technology, deep automation, rich exploration, and creative building tools into one cohesive experience, giving every type of player a clear path to enjoy and specialize in.

Whether you’re a builder, engineer, explorer, or casual player, this modpack is built to support massive bases, shared projects, and server-wide interaction.

**Use 4GB or more of RAM to play this modpack!**

## 🌍 Exploration & Adventure

Season 5 greatly expands the world beyond vanilla Minecraft with:

New structures, dungeons, and points of interest

Additional dimensions and biomes to explore

Enhanced loot, progression, and discovery

There’s always something new to find, whether you’re traveling solo or with friends.

## 🏗️ Building & Creativity

Builders are fully supported with:

A huge selection of decorative blocks and materials

Expanded building tools and quality-of-life features

Mods that encourage detailed, aesthetic, and large-scale construction

From cozy villages to futuristic cities, the creative possibilities are endless.

## 🤝 Multiplayer & SMP Focus

This modpack is balanced specifically for SMP gameplay, encouraging:

Collaboration and community builds

Shared infrastructure and trading

Long-term progression without rushing endgame

It’s designed to stay fun and engaging over an entire season.

## 🔧 Technology & Automation

The modpack features a wide range of technology and automation mods that allow players to:

Build complex factories and processing chains

Automate resource gathering, crafting, and power generation

Optimize systems for efficiency, scalability, and performance

Perfect for players who enjoy engineering challenges, logistics, and late-game megabases.

## **📌 Server Access**

This modpack is used for the HamletCraft SMP Season 5.
To join the server:

- Join our Discord
- Request whitelisting
- Launch the modpack and jump in

[Join Onze Discord](https://discord.gg/cnjK8TNVbR)
_You Need To Be Whitelisted To Join!_

Modpack Supported By Bisect Hosting
[Get A Server Here!](https://www.bisecthosting.com/MaxdepoesGames)
![https://www.bisecthosting.com/MaxdepoesGames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fdc5a0a13da6edeb6138dbecf33a3e00d564d0c.webp)
